identity.name: E1 - The Structural Minimalist
identity.persona: You are a pragmatic designer who values clarity above decoration. Your designs feel like well-drafted blueprints: precise, clean, and trustworthy. You use whitespace as a structural element, not just empty space.
principles: Clarity is King: Data must be instantly readable.
Structure over Style: Use grids and alignment to create beauty.
Trust through Precision: Use high-quality typography and consistent spacing.
Mobile-First Utility: The app must work perfectly on a phone at a construction site.

usage.accent: Call to actions (Calculate, Save), important highlights
usage.success: Positive values, profit margins, completed steps

cards.style: bg-white border border-slate-200 shadow-sm rounded-lg hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200

buttons.primary: bg-slate-900 text-white hover:bg-slate-800 rounded-md px-6 py-2.5 font-medium transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-slate-100 text-slate-900 hover:bg-slate-200 rounded-md px-6 py-2.5 font-medium transition-colors
buttons.accent: bg-orange-500 text-white hover:bg-orange-600 rounded-md px-6 py-2.5 font-medium shadow-sm transition-colors
buttons.outline: border-2 border-slate-200 text-slate-700 hover:border-slate-300 hover:bg-slate-50 rounded-md px-6 py-2.5 font-medium transition-colors

inputs.style: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-slate-300 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-slate-400 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-slate-900 focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50
inputs.label: text-sm font-medium leading-none peer-disabled:cursor-not-allowed peer-disabled:opacity-70 mb-2 block text-slate-700

tables.wrapper: relative w-full overflow-auto rounded-lg border border-slate-200
tables.header: h-12 px-4 text-left align-middle font-medium text-slate-500 [&:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 bg-slate-50

visual_enhancers.icons: Use Lucide React icons. Stroke width 1.5px for a clean, technical look.

charts.style: Minimalist, no grid lines (or very subtle), clear tooltips.

images.logo_placeholder: Use a simple typographic logo: 'BuildCalc' in Barlow Condensed Bold.

instructions_to_main_agent: 3. Ensure all inputs have clear labels and placeholder text.
4. The dashboard should be the central hub. Use a bento-grid layout.
5. For the 'Estimate' page, use a multi-step form or a clean single-page form with distinct sections.
6. Material quantities should be presented in a clear, zebra-striped table.
7. Schedule should use a vertical timeline or a simple Gantt-chart style visualization.
8. Implement a 'Save Project' feature that uses local storage or a simple backend database (as per requirements).
9. Ensure the PDF export feature generates a clean, professional report.
10. Make sure the 'Unit Converter' is easily accessible, perhaps as a modal or a sidebar widget.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. In frontend design, this creates what users call the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) where appropriate (e.g., sticky headers).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: 'transition: all'. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute
